overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a long coat and hat walking along rainy industrial docks. The character passes wooden warehouses, crosses railway tracks, and approaches a large steamship in a gritty, overcast harbor setting with smokestacks visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden dock walkway beside water

events.description: passes under covered roof section of the dock walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock beside the water, passing small moored boats

entered.detail: weathered green wooden planks of the dock warehouse wall
wet wooden planks of the dock walkway
small boats with red and white coloring moored in the water
simple wooden railing along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow covered dock walkway with a green wooden warehouse wall on the right and water with small moored boats on the left. The atmosphere is overcast and industrial, with distant smokestacks visible. The character passes under an overhead roof section around the 7-second mark.

events.description: exits covered dock into open industrial area with train tracks and brick buildings
crosses the railway tracks at the industrial crossing

agents.ego_description: walking across the railway tracks in the industrial harbor area, approaching large brick buildings

notable_agents.action: riding a horse along the tracks in the distance

entered.detail: large brick industrial building with red arched doorways
metal railway tracks running parallel to the dock
tall industrial smokestacks emitting black smoke
wooden telegraph poles with multiple cross-arms and wires

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered dock into a wide-open industrial area with railway tracks. The character crosses the tracks while passing a large brick industrial building on the left. In the distance, smokestacks billow smoke against the gray sky, and a horse rider can be seen on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock platform with train tracks alongside

events.description: passes a stationary horse-drawn wagon parked on the right side of the dock

agents.ego_description: walking along the open dock, passing industrial signs and a parked wagon

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon parked stationary on the side of the dock walkway

entered.detail: black and white sign reading NO SMOKING mounted on a wooden pole
green wooden industrial building with BOTTLING painted in yellow letters
small brown wooden warehouse with white-trimmed windows

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the open wooden dock, passing a No Smoking sign and a stationary horse-drawn wagon. The green bottling plant building is prominent on the left, while train tracks run parallel on the right. The dock stretches ahead toward more industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cargo storage area alongside steamship

events.description: enters covered storage area with stacked burlap sacks under metal canopy
approaching large steamship moored at the dock, ship hull becomes prominent

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered storage shed toward the large steamship

entered.detail: metal-roofed covered walkway with support beams
stacks of burlap sacks piled under the covered storage area
large white and black steamship with red funnels moored at dock
tall masts and rigging of the steamship and other vessels

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered storage area filled with stacked burlap sacks. The walkway continues alongside a massive steamship moored at the dock, with its hull and masts dominating the left side of the frame. The industrial harbor atmosphere continues with cargo equipment visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty industrial harbor that transitions from a narrow covered walkway into a vast open dockside area. It begins beside a green wooden warehouse wall and moored boats under an overcast sky, moving beneath an overhead roof section before emerging into a wide-open space. As the character crosses railway tracks, the scene expands to reveal a large brick building and distant billowing smokestacks, passing a horse rider and a stationary wagon along the wooden pier. The perspective then shifts past a bottling plant and a no-smoking sign, moving parallel to the tracks toward a semi-covered storage area. Finally, the camera glides past stacks of burlap sacks as the massive hull and masts of a moored steamship come to dominate the frame.
